rule_metadata.name: ft_gzip
rule_metadata.author: Jason Batchelor
rule_metadata.desc: Trigger on magic of GZip compressed files

rules.rule_text:
rule ft_gzip
{
	meta:
		author = "Jason Batchelor"
		company = "Emerson"
		lastmod = "20151116"
		desc = "Trigger on magic of GZip compressed files"

	strings:
		$magic = { 1f 8b 08 }

	condition:
		$magic at 0
}
